name: synapse
author: shadoprizm
description: Self-learning memory engine that augments OpenClaw's built-in memory tools (memory_search/memory_get) with structured learning, preference tracking, pattern detection, and cross-session intelligence consolidation.

steps: No external dependencies required — uses OpenClaw's built-in memory tools
install.notes: Instruction-only skill. No scripts, no Python, no ML model downloads. All operations use native OpenClaw tools (memory_search, memory_get, read, write, edit).

env.notes: SYNAPSE_DATA_DIR overrides the default memory path. Defaults to ~/.openclaw/workspace-astra/memory/synapse/

credentials.notes: No external API keys, no network access, no third-party services. All data stays local.

network.notes: Zero network access. Synapse operates entirely on local files using OpenClaw's built-in tools. No telemetry, no external APIs, no data transmission.

privacy.data_access: Reads ~/.openclaw/sessions/ and workspace memory files locally
privacy.data_storage: Writes structured JSON and markdown to ~/.openclaw/workspace-astra/memory/synapse/
privacy.redaction: Does NOT store API keys, passwords, tokens, or sensitive credentials. Agents are instructed to skip sensitive content during learning cycles.
privacy.persistence: Local files only. No cloud storage, no external backup.
